nasb.text: And His disciples said to Him, “You see the crowd pressing in on You, and You say, ‘Who touched Me?’ ”

esv.text: And his disciples said to him, “You see the crowd pressing around you, and yet you say, ‘Who touched me?’”

cnv.text: 門徒對他說：“你看，這麼多人擁擠你，你還問‘誰摸我’嗎？”

ccb.text: 门徒对祂说：“你看，这么多人在你周围挤来挤去，你怎么问谁摸你呢？”

csbs.text: 他的门徒们对他说：“你看这群人拥挤着你，你还问‘谁摸了我’吗？”
